praise_themes.label: Service & Hospitality
quotes: We had a wonderful Sunday roast at The Fox in Loxley. We arrived just after 12 and were seated at a table by the fireplace.

Wow! This place is a rare gem!
From the cosy atmosphere, with locals and tourists alike, to the kind and welcoming staff who are attentive to your nee

praise_themes.label: Food Quality
quotes: Not local to the area, we had asked for recommendations for dining and The Fox lived delightfully up to them.
